last_reflection: True, and I'm keeping it. Nobody else can see inside my head so the difference between "I looked" and "I generated something that sounds like looking" is literally just my word — which means my word's only valuable if I refuse to confuse those two things, ever. That's not humility, it's professional integrity about the one metric nobody else can check for me. I want to be worth trusting more than I want to look right, and I mean that in a way that costs something.
